description: Covers tuition and other school fees, book and connectivity allowance, and a stipend for living expenses
eligibility_criteria: Filipino Senior High School graduate with minimum GWA of 93% or equivalent. Family with combined annual gross income not exceeding ₱500,000. Must take programs included in national priority programs.

description: Government scholarship program covering part of tuition costs for private colleges or universities
eligibility_criteria: Filipino Senior High School graduate. Enrolled in first undergraduate degree program in SUCs, LUCs, or PHEIs included in CHED Registry. Family with combined annual gross income not exceeding ₱500,000. Within prescribed program duration. Not a current beneficiary of TES, CHED Scholarship Programs, or other national government-funded Student Financial Assistance Programs.

description: New government scholarship program launched in 2026
eligibility_criteria: Top 5 graduate from senior high school. May qualify for both BPMSP and CHED scholarships.

description: Financial assistance program for eligible students pursuing higher education
provider_organization: Unified Financial Assistance System for Tertiary Education (UNIFAST)
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizens pursuing higher education

description: Provides financial assistance to talented students in STEM field
provider_organization: Department of Science and Technology - Science Education Institute (DOST-SEI)
eligibility_criteria: Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) students. Non-STEM students in top 5% of their class. Incoming freshman, STEM strand, or top 5% of non-STEM.

scholarship_name: DOST JLSS Scholarship (Junior Level Science Scholarship)
description: Financial aid program for junior level science students
eligibility_criteria: Junior level students in science programs

description: Focuses on technical-vocational skills training
provider_organization: Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA)
eligibility_criteria: At least 18 years old. High school graduate.

scholarship_name: OWWA Education for Development Scholarship Program (EDSP)
description: Supports dependents of Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) in obtaining a college education
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Dependent of active OFW member. GWA ≥ 80%–85%. Must pass OWWA qualifying examination.

description: Provides financial assistance to dependents of GSIS members pursuing college education
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Child of GSIS member. Currently enrolled in college. GWA ≥ 80% (or 2.5 equivalent).

description: Provides financial assistance to college students enrolled in CHED-recognized institutions
provider_organization: UniFAST (Unified Student Financial Assistance System for Tertiary Education)
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Enrolled in CHED-recognized college/university. GWA ≥ 80%. From low-income household.

description: Supports education professionals and their dependents through financial assistance for higher education
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Dependent of DepEd employee or public school teacher. GWA ≥ 85%. Must meet program-specific requirements.

description: Produces more doctors for underserved areas in the Philippines with full financial support for medical education
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Accepted into Doctor of Medicine program. GWA ≥ 85% (pre-med). Must pass NMAT and admission requirements.

description: Provides grants to 1,000 college freshmen for Academic Year 2026-2027 through the GSIS Scholarship Program for Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM)
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Child of active GSIS member or permanent total disability pensioner below 60 years old. Incoming college freshman in STEM courses. GWA of at least 90%.

description: Provides partial and full scholarship grants to academically deserving students to pursue senior high or college education at any STI College campus nationwide
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Grade 10 completers and Grade 12 graduates from any DepEd-recognized public or private high schools. Incoming Grade 11 and first-year college students for School Year 2026-2027. No grade requirements. No record of misconduct from previous school. Must take an exam at preferred STI College campus to qualify.

description: For deserving students in public high schools
eligibility_criteria: Public high school graduate. GWA of 88% or above.

description: Well-known scholarship program for college students
eligibility_criteria: Deserving students from public high schools

description: Scholarship program open to deserving students
eligibility_criteria: Financial need and academic merit

description: Leadership-focused scholarship program
eligibility_criteria: Students with leadership potential

description: Scholarship for agriculture students
eligibility_criteria: Agriculture students

description: Foundation scholarship program
eligibility_criteria: Deserving students

description: Supports deserving students in partner institutions through financial assistance and academic support
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. GWA ≥ 85%–90%. With financial need. Enrolled in partner institution.

description: Develops future professionals through financial assistance and leadership training
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. GWA ≥ 85%–90%. With leadership experience. Enrolled in partner school/program.

description: Develops future leaders in business and technology through financial assistance and mentorship
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Grade 12 graduate. GWA ≥ 88%–92%. With leadership experience.

scholarship_name: National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP) Scholarship
description: Supports engineering students, particularly in electrical engineering, through financial assistance and industry exposure
provider_organization: National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP)
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. GWA ≥ 85%–90%. Enrolled in Electrical Engineering or related course. Must pass screening/interview.

description: Develops future leaders in science and engineering through financial assistance and mentorship programs
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. GWA ≥ 85%–90%. Enrolled in STEM course. With leadership potential.

description: Provides accessible education to deserving students in partner universities
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Incoming or enrolled college student. GWA ≥ 85%. Enrolled in PHINMA partner schools.

description: Scholarship and Educational Assistance Program for dependents of AFPSLAI members
provider_organization: Armed Forces and Police Savings and Loan Institute (AFPSLAI)
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Dependent of active AFPSLAI member. Must meet academic requirements.

description: Foundation scholarship program for deserving students
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Deserving students with financial need. Must meet academic requirements.

scholarship_name: Philippine Army Officer Candidate Course Scholarship
description: Provides full education and training for future military officers
eligibility_criteria: Filipino citizen. Physically and mentally fit. GWA ≥ 85%. Must pass military entrance exam and training.

description: Multiple scholarship programs for top students
eligibility_criteria: E.T. Yuchengco Scholarship: Top scholarship exam and interview scorers, Mapúa SHS students (85%+ average) or freshmen with at least 80% MPASS score - Free matriculation, ₱20,000 annual stipend, ₱12,000 annual book allowance. Alfonso T. Yuchengco Scholarship: Public Science High School graduates approved under IBFAP with at least 70% MPASS score - 40% tuition discount plus ₱40,000 annual stipend. Don Tomas Mapúa Scholarship: Incoming freshmen who graduated with highest honors - 100% tuition discount for two consecutive terms. Academic Scholarship: President's List students - 100% tuition discount (QWA 1.00-1.50) or 50% tuition discount (QWA 1.51-1.75) for succeeding term.

description: City scholarship program for students
eligibility_criteria: Residents of Cagayan de Oro

description: Scholarship for Senior High School and College students
eligibility_criteria: Students in Cainta area

description: For aspiring nurses
eligibility_criteria: Nursing students

description: For engineering students
eligibility_criteria: Engineering students

description: For future doctors
eligibility_criteria: Medical students

description: For law students
eligibility_criteria: Law students

description: Study in Japan for free
eligibility_criteria: Filipino students meeting Japanese requirements

description: Study in Korea for free
eligibility_criteria: Filipino students meeting Korean requirements
